name: Kuwait
summary: Day 92 (Saturday May 30). **NO NEW KUWAIT-DIRECTED KINETIC EVENT THIS WINDOW — THE 28 MAY IRGC MISSILE (INTERCEPTED OVER KUWAIT, ZERO CASUALTIES) WAS NOT FOLLOWED BY ANY FURTHER STRIKE THROUGH 30 MAY. The new Gulf enforcement event is the US disabling of the Lian Star in the Gulf of Oman (not Kuwaiti airspace). Kuwait remains the site of the last calibrated Iranian missile, now confirmed as a face-saving one-off, not the start of an escalation. No trigger move.** Day 90 (Thursday May 28). **KUWAIT BECAME A DIRECT PARTY TO THE US-IRAN EXCHANGE FOR THE FIRST TIME THIS CYCLE — ITS AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED AN IRGC BALLISTIC MISSILE FIRED AT A US AIRBASE ON KUWAITI SOIL AT ~04:50 LOCAL MAY 28. CENTCOM confirmed Iran launched the missile 'toward Kuwait' targeting the 'American airbase, as the origin of the aggression'; Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted it with no damage or casualties; CENTCOM called it an 'egregious ceasefire violation.' Kuwait — previously a silent GCC partner on airspace access — is now the physical venue of an Iranian strike on US forces, notable enough to anchor a dedicated Wikipedia article ('2026 Iranian strikes on Kuwait'). Watch for a Kuwaiti MoFA statement and any GCC condemnation as a tone marker. CRITICAL framing: the strike was telegraphed/intercepted/zero-casualty (the 2020 Ain al-Assad face-saving template), and both Washington and Tehran kept negotiating — NOT a return to full-scale war (Fact-Checker F1).** PRIOR (May 9): Day 71 Saturday. **KUWAIT NAMED IN WSJ SCOOP ON US OFFENSIVE-AIRSPACE ACCESS RESTRICTIONS (alongside Saudi Arabia) — KUWAIT REMAINS PUBLICLY SILENT (UNLIKE SAUDI WHO PUBLICLY DENIED VIA AL-HADATH).** Per the WSJ scoop, Saudi Arabia and Kuwait had denied US base/airspace access for Project Freedom and those restrictions had since been 'lifted' per US officials. Saudi went on record denying via Al-Hadath; Kuwait has not made any public statement. The Kuwaiti silence is the cleanest tell of GCC-coordination on the diplomatic-track posture: Saudi denies publicly while operationally permitting; Kuwait stays silent so no contradiction can be created. PRIOR FRAMING (preserved): Kuwait included in India-evacuation architecture; April 12 Saudi MoFA protest summons of Iraqi ambassador after Iraqi-militia drone targeting of Kuwait's only civilian airport (named militias Kataib Hezbollah + Asaib Ahl al-Haq per WSJ/ISW); cumulative damage envelope: oil ministry HQ, power plants, 3x desalination plants, airport fuel tanks, refinery; oil exports remain halted under force majeure.

recent_signals.headline: **NO NEW KUWAIT-DIRECTED EVENT — 28 MAY INTERCEPTED MISSILE WAS A ONE-OFF (CONFIRMED NON-ESCALATION).** No further strike near Kuwait through 30 May; the new Gulf enforcement action (Lian Star) was in the Gulf of Oman. Kuwait's role this window is the site of the last calibrated, intercepted, zero-casualty Iranian missile.
sources: Iran International liveblog 30 May; Intel dossier 2026-05-30 A1
recent_signals.verification: No new Kuwait-directed kinetic event = CONFIRMED NON-EVENT; 28 May missile confirmed face-saving one-off. No weight change.

recent_signals.headline: **KUWAIT'S AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED AN IRGC BALLISTIC MISSILE FIRED AT A US AIRBASE ON KUWAITI SOIL AT ~04:50 LOCAL MAY 28 — KUWAIT IS NOW A DIRECT PARTY TO THE US-IRAN EXCHANGE FOR THE FIRST TIME THIS CYCLE.** CENTCOM confirmed Iran launched a ballistic missile 'toward Kuwait' targeting the 'American airbase, as the origin of the aggression,' in response to a second US 'defensive' strike near Bandar Abbas; Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted it with no damage or casualties; CENTCOM called it an 'egregious ceasefire violation.' Kuwait had been a silent GCC partner on airspace access; it is now the physical venue of an Iranian strike on US forces. The strike was calibrated/intercepted/zero-casualty (Ain al-Assad mode) and both sides kept negotiating — NOT a return to full-scale war. Watch for a Kuwaiti MoFA statement and any GCC condemnation as a tone marker.
sources: CENTCOM (ballistic missile toward Kuwait, intercepted, 'egregious ceasefire violation') — official military
Kuwaiti military / Kuwait MoD (interception confirmed) — official
recent_signals.verification: Iran ballistic missile fired at US airbase on Kuwaiti soil + Kuwaiti interception, zero casualty = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM + Kuwait MoD, multi-wire); SIGNIFICANCE = calibrated/contained (Ain al-Assad), NOT escalation-to-war (F1).

recent_signals.headline: KUWAIT NAMED IN WSJ SCOOP ON US OFFENSIVE-AIRSPACE ACCESS RESTRICTIONS (alongside Saudi Arabia) — KUWAIT REMAINS PUBLICLY SILENT WHILE SAUDI WENT ON RECORD DENYING VIA AL-HADATH. Cleanest tell of GCC coordination on diplomatic-track posture: Saudi denies publicly while operationally permitting; Kuwait stays silent so no contradiction can be created. No Iranian kinetic action against Kuwait-bound vessels in cycle.
recent_signals.verification: Kuwait public silence = CONFIRMED via absence; WSJ underlying scoop = CONFIRMED REPORTED via wire
